name: Summon Construct

components.materialDescription: a 10-pound cube of iron, stone, or crystal worth 400+ GP

placementEligibility.notes: Summon Construct manifests the Construct Spirit in an unoccupied space the caster can see within range.

effects.description: Summon one Construct Spirit in a visible unoccupied space within 90 feet for up to 1 hour with concentration, choosing a Clay, Metal, or Stone material. The spirit is an ally, shares your Initiative count but acts immediately after you, obeys verbal commands with no action required, Dodges and avoids danger when uncommanded, disappears at 0 Hit Points or when the spell ends, and uses the slot level for AC, Hit Points, and Slam damage.

scaling.customFormula: Use the slot level as the spell's level in the Construct Spirit stat block: AC is 13 + spell level, HP is 40 + 15 for each spell level above 4, and Slam damage is 1d8 + 4 + spell level.

conditionalEndings.description: The construct spirit disappears when it drops to 0 Hit Points.

summon.objectDescription: Construct Spirit ally that shares the caster's initiative, acts immediately after the caster, obeys verbal commands with no caster action, and uses Slam as its combat action.

specialActions.name: Slam
specialActions.description: Melee spell attack, reach 5 ft. Hit: 1d8 + 4 + the spell's level Bludgeoning damage, plus the material rider (Clay heals nearby allies, Metal deals Fire damage, Stone knocks the target Prone).

socialEffect.notes: The summoned Construct Spirit is an ally to the caster and allies, understands the caster languages, shares initiative, and follows commands.

aiContext.prompt: Choose the Construct Spirit material (Clay, Metal, or Stone) and arrival space; use the caster's spell attack modifier for Slam and apply the material rider on a hit.

options.label: Clay
options.summary: Summon a Clay Construct Spirit whose Slam can restore Hit Points to a creature within 10 feet.
options.notes: The summoned creature uses the Construct Spirit stat block and slot-level scaling.

options.label: Metal
options.summary: Summon a Metal Construct Spirit whose Slam deals extra Fire damage.
options.notes: The summoned creature uses the Construct Spirit stat block and slot-level scaling.

options.label: Stone
options.summary: Summon a Stone Construct Spirit whose Slam can knock a Large or smaller target Prone.
options.notes: The summoned creature uses the Construct Spirit stat block and slot-level scaling.

modeChoice.notes: The material choice selects the Construct Spirit's Slam rider.

description: You call forth the spirit of a construct. It manifests in an unoccupied space that you can see within range and uses the Construct Spirit stat block. When you cast the spell, choose a material: Clay, Metal, or Stone. The creature disappears when it drops to 0 Hit Points or when the spell ends. The creature is an ally to you and your allies. In combat, the creature shares your Initiative count, but it takes its turn immediately after yours. It obeys your verbal commands (no action required by you). If you don't issue any, it takes the Dodge action and uses its movement to avoid danger.
higherLevels: Using a Higher-Level Spell Slot. Use the spell slot's level for the spell's level in the stat block. The Construct Spirit's Hit Points and Slam damage increase as the spell's level increases.
